Struct Config

  • Defined in File config.hpp

Struct Documentation

struct Config

Public Members

real_t sim_T = {(real_t)5.0}
real_t sim_dt = {(real_t)1e-3}
Vector3r sim_gravity = {(real_t)0, (real_t)0, (real_t)-9.81}
int output_interval_steps = {50}
int output_heightfield_stride = {8}
bool output_contacts_body_vectors = {false}
std::string output_folder = {"./vtk_out"}
std::string output_filename_prefix = {"scene"}
bool output_write_contacts = {false}
std::string collision_broadphase = {"dynamic_aabb"}
bool collision_disable_all = {false}
real_t collision_security_margin = {(real_t)0.0}
int collision_max_raw_contacts = {1024}
std::size_t collision_max_patches = {4}
bool collision_use_patch_vertices = {true}
real_t collision_match_max_dist = {(real_t)0.02}
real_t collision_min_pair_contact_distance = {(real_t)0.0}
bool friction_enable = {false}
std::string friction_combine = {"min"}
real_t friction_default_mu = {(real_t)0.5}
bool debug_rb = {false}
bool debug_pj = {false}
bool debug_mesh = {false}
SolverType solver = {SolverType::ProjectedJacobi}
int pj_max_iterations = {200000}
real_t pj_tol_abs = {(real_t)1e-4}
real_t pj_tol_rel = {(real_t)1e-4}
real_t pj_relaxation = {(real_t)0.9}
real_t pj_alpha = {(real_t)0.3}
bool pj_nesterov = {false}
real_t pj_nesterov_beta_threshold = {(real_t)0.995}
int pj_nesterov_restart_limit = {4}
bool pj_warmstart = {true}
bool pj_rdiag_true_delassus = {false}
std::string pj_convergence_csv_dir = {""}
real_t constraint_bias_factor = {(real_t)0.001}
std::string qoco_backend = {"auto"}
real_t ip_kkt_static_reg = {(real_t)1e-8}
real_t ip_kkt_dynamic_reg = {(real_t)1e-8}
int ip_iter_ref_iters = {0}
bool has_pj_alpha = {false}
bool has_pj_max_iterations = {false}
bool has_pj_tol_abs = {false}
bool has_pj_tol_rel = {false}
bool has_pj_relaxation = {false}
IntegratorType integrator = {IntegratorType::Moreau}
real_t moreau_theta = {(real_t)1.0}
bool moreau_implicit_gyroscopy = {false}
bool moreau_lambda_theta = {false}
std::string scene_name = {"none-specified"}
